recipe.title: CREAMED SPINACH

ingredient_lines.raw_text: 750 800g spinach, thick stalks removed and washed

steps.instruction: Bring a pan of salted water to the boil. Plunge in the spinach leaves and cook for 2-3 minutes until tender. Drain in a colander, refresh under the cold tap and squeeze out any excess water.

ingredient_lines.raw_text: 750 800g spinach, thick stalks removed and washed

steps.instruction: Tip the spinach into a food processor and blend as smoothly or as coarsely as you wish. You can take it to this stage in advance if you like, then finish at the last minute.

ingredient_lines.raw_text: 750 800g spinach, thick stalks removed and washed
salt and freshly ground black pepper

steps.instruction: Simmer the cream in a saucepan until reduced by about half, then stir in the spinach and season with salt and pepper to taste. Cook over a low heat for a minute or so, stirring every so often, until the spinach is hot. Serve immediately.
